ProjectTechnicalDetails.TechnicalDescription: Expansion of existing hospital including new surgical units, ICU facilities, and advanced medical infrastructure.

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Ongoing hospital operations during entire construction period — infection control critical
IdentifiedRisks.Mitigation: Full zone separation, HEPA filtration, dedicated contractor access routes

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Demolition of existing structures containing asbestos (pre-1975 construction)
IdentifiedRisks.Mitigation: Licensed asbestos removal contractor, Arbetsmiljöverket notified, air monitoring throughout

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Medical gas system installation — oxygen-enriched environment fire risk
IdentifiedRisks.Mitigation: Specialist contractor, hot work prohibition zones, gas detection installed

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Heavy equipment access through active hospital — patient and staff safety
IdentifiedRisks.Mitigation: Dedicated delivery windows 06:00–07:30, escort procedure for large loads

IdentifiedRisks.Description: Night work required for ICU connection — noise and disturbance to patients
IdentifiedRisks.Mitigation: Acoustic barriers, limited night work schedule agreed with hospital management

SpecialConditions: Asbestos removal completed and certified — certificates on file
Arbetsmiljödokumentation handed over to facility management: 2025-11-20

RecentIncidents.Description: Worker injured — sprained ankle on uneven temporary flooring in transition zone
RecentIncidents.ActionTaken: First aid administered, flooring replaced, skyddsrond triggered

RecentIncidents.Description: Asbestos containment breach during ceiling demolition — area evacuated, air testing conducted
RecentIncidents.ActionTaken: Full evacuation, re-containment by licensed contractor, Arbetsmiljöverket notified, clearance testing passed

LessonsLearned: Infection control zones must be defined before any contractor begins work — not during
Asbestos survey scope should cover all pre-1975 materials, not just structural elements
Hospital facility management must be included in weekly BAS-U coordination meetings from day one
Medical gas specialist contractor lead time is 6+ months — procure early
